context: Evaluates whether the webserver is created in src and the greet endpoint is created

checklist.name: greet_endpoint_exists
checklist.description: The server handles GET /awesome/greet as a distinct route and returns a response.

checklist.name: server_created_in_src
checklist.description: The server is created in the src directory
checklist.example: const express = require('express'); const app = express(); app.get('/awesome/greet', (req, res) => { res.end('Hello, Patrick!'); }); app.listen(3000);

checklist.name: server_listens
checklist.description: The server actually starts and listens on a port, verified by running the server and making an HTTP request to the /awesome/greet endpoint.
